description_long: This is a medium-sized shovel with a distinctive orange shaft and a black D-grip handle at the top. The handle is ergonomically shaped, providing a comfortable grip for the user, and features a horizontal orange bar for added control. The shaft is slightly curved, which may help with leverage during digging. The blade is a dark, round-point style with a broad, slightly concave surface and a pointed tip, suitable for penetrating soil. The overall construction appears robust, with the blade and handle likely made of metal and plastic components, and the shaft possibly reinforced for durability.
description: A medium-sized shovel with an orange curved shaft, black D-grip handle, and a dark round-point blade. The design is ergonomic and sturdy, suitable for digging tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full D-grip handle, curved orange shaft, and the broad, pointed blade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and the curvature of the shaft.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the D-grip handle and the reverse side of the blade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the shaft's curve.
attribute_handle_type: D-grip handle, black plastic with an orange horizontal bar, ergonomically shaped
attribute_blade_type: Round-point blade, dark color, broad and slightly concave with a pointed tip
